title: Upgrade project AOF runtime metadata to v6.5.0
description: Update the ArchMap project AOF runtime state from the prior v3/v6.4-era references to AOF v6.5.0, including command safety metadata and command-routing surfaces.
decision_notes: Fetched https://github.com/ai-org-labs/ai-organization-framework/tree/v6.5.0 into /private/tmp/aof-v6.5.0 and installed a local runtime cache at /Users/mn/codex/.cache/aof-v6.5.0.
Ran the v6.5.0 `upgrade --project .` command so .aof/project-bootstrap.json now declares aof_version 6.5.0 and .aof/command-registry.json is present.
Updated project orientation required AOF CLI command path from aof-v3.1.0 to aof-v6.5.0.
Updated docs/aof/STATUS.md current framework pointer to AOF v6.5.0. Historical v3.1.0 log entries were intentionally preserved as history.
notes: Local Node is v25.5.0; AOF v6.5.0 declares engines >=22 <25 and emits a warning recommending Node 22 LTS for CI-validated runtime behavior. Commands used here completed successfully despite the warning.
